notes: Full dinner menu + beverages captured (raw bar/sushi, shareables, bowls & greens, fish/crab/land-&-sea entrees, sides, craft cocktails, beer, wine-by-the-glass, NA). 'Off the Hook' fish marked GF per the menu's note (prepared gluten-free, not a GF kitchen). Several whole-crab/king-crab items are high market-style prices. Plain premium spirit pours omitted as not composition-relevant.
